zh.lifeSummary: Richard Wormall是William Wormall的兒子，於1550年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾衛克菲德。他於1574年12月8日與Maria Wormall在英國英格蘭越可爾艾藍德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1656年在他的家鄉享年107歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Wormall是William Wormall的儿子，于1550年出生在英国英格兰越可爾衛克菲德。他于1574年12月8日与Maria Wormall在英国英格兰越可爾艾藍德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1656年在他的家乡享年107岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wormall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Wormald
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Wormald in Yorkshire or Wormhill in Derbyshire. The Yorkshire placenames derives from the Old English personal name Wulfrūn + Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’. The Derbyshire placename derives from an Old English personal name Wyrma + Old English hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Wormall was born in 1550, in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of William Wormall. He married Maria Wormall on 8 December 1574, in Elland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1656, in his hometown, at the age of 107.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Wormall est né en 1550, à Wakefield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de William Wormall. Il a épousé Maria Wormall le 8 décembre 1574, à Elland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1656, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 107 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Wormallは1550年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワケフィールドでWilliam Wormallの息子として生まれた。1574年12月8日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエランドでMaria Wormallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1656年に故郷で107歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Wormall(은)는 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨이크필드에서 William Wormall의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1574년 12월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 엘랜드에서 Maria Wormall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1656년 그의 고향에서 107세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Wormall родился в 1550 г. в местности веикефиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали William Wormall. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Wormall 8 декабря 1574 г. в местности элланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1656 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 107 лет.
